name: This Afternoon
detailedForecast: Patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms before 5pm, then patchy fog and a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Cloudy, with a high near 71. Northeast wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
